overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, walking through a neon-lit indoor corridor with glass walls overlooking the city, then exiting to an outdoor urban plaza surrounded by towering buildings with massive holographic advertisements and colorful neon facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon floor lighting and glass city views

events.description: camera turns left to follow the corridor direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit corridor, observing digital billboards and the cityscape through glass walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking toward camera

entered.detail: large glass windows overlooking the city with neon reflections
continuous orange and yellow neon strips along the floor edges
large illuminated advertisement screens on the right wall
red and black automated vending kiosk

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian corridor illuminated by vibrant neon floor lights. The left side features glass walls revealing the city outside, while the right side has vending machines and digital billboards. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor approaching building exit with large digital displays

events.description: approaching the exit stairs leading to outdoor plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor toward the exit, passing seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench near the glass wall

entered.detail: staircase leading down to the exit with purple lighting
two large adjacent holographic advertisement screens above exit

segments.scene_description: Proceeding deeper into the corridor toward the building exit. Twin large digital billboards become visible above the staircase. The glass wall remains on the left while the right side opens up to seating areas. The corridor narrows as it approaches the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exit stairs transitioning to open plaza

events.description: exiting the building into the open urban plaza
transition from neon interior lighting to mixed outdoor city lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs and emerging into the open plaza, observing the surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella descending stairs ahead

entered.detail: open paved area with neon-lit buildings surrounding
tall building with shifting colored lights and large signage
tropical tree in the plaza center

segments.scene_description: Descending the stairs and exiting the covered walkway into a vast open plaza. The environment shifts from enclosed neon corridor to an open urban space surrounded by towering buildings with massive digital facades. A pedestrian with a glowing umbrella walks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza surrounded by skyscrapers and neon advertisements

events.description: turning left to walk along the plaza sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, looking up at the towering neon-lit buildings and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: raised roadway structure with support columns
tall modern glass building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Exploring the expansive urban plaza surrounded by massive skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon displays and holographic advertisements. The camera moves along the sidewalk, passing palm trees and parked vehicles, with an elevated highway visible in the distance. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with intense neon colors illuminating the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit pedestrian corridor into a sprawling, futuristic urban plaza. It begins by gliding through a covered walkway illuminated by vibrant floor lights, passing digital billboards and glass walls that offer glimpses of the city. As the camera proceeds deeper, the corridor narrows toward a staircase flanked by large digital displays and open seating areas. The scene then shifts as the camera descends the stairs and exits the enclosure, transitioning from the sheltered walkway into a vast open space where a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella leads the way. Finally, the view expands across the expansive plaza, moving past palm trees and parked vehicles toward towering skyscrapers draped in massive holographic advertisements and neon facades under a dark cyberpunk sky.
